name: OpenMontage
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        calesthio /

      OpenMontage  

    
      World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
summary: OpenMontage 是全球首个开源智能视频制作系统，包含12条流水线、52个工具和500多项智能体技能，能将AI编程助手转变为完整的视频制作工作室，值得关注因为它大幅降低了专业视频创作的门槛。

name: mukul975
description:
Sponsor
    
  



      
            
    

    

        
          Star


  

  
    
    


      
        mukul975 /

      Anthropic-Cybersecurity-Skills  

    
      817 structured cybersecurity skills for AI agents · Mapped to 6 frameworks: MITRE ATT&CK, NIST CSF 2.0, MITRE ATLAS, D3FEND, NIST AI RMF & MITRE F3 (Fight Fraud) · agentskills.io standard · Works with Claude Code, GitHub Copilot, Codex CLI, Cursor, Gemini CLI & 20+ platforms · 29 security domains · Apache 2.0
summary: 该项目提供了817个结构化的网络安全技能，并映射到MITRE ATT&CK等6个主流框架，支持Claude Code、GitHub Copilot等20多个AI平台，是构建AI安全代理的标准化技能库，值得关注。

name: deer-flow
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        bytedance /

      deer-flow  

    
      An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.
summary: Deer Flow 是字节跳动开源的长周期超级智能体框架，能在沙箱、记忆、工具等模块支持下自主完成从研究到编码的复杂任务，值得关注因为它将任务执行时长从分钟级扩展到小时级，展现了实际可用的高阶自动化能力。

name: ai-website-cloner-template
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        JCodesMore /

      ai-website-cloner-template  

    
      Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents
summary: 该项目是一个利用AI编码代理，通过单条命令即可克隆任意网站的模板工具，值得关注是因为它大幅简化了网站复制流程，提升了开发效率。

name: codebase-memory-mcp
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        DeusData /

      codebase-memory-mcp  

    
      High-performance code intelligence MCP server. Indexes codebases into a persistent knowledge graph — average repo in milliseconds. 158 languages, sub-ms queries, 99% fewer tokens. Single static binary, zero dependencies.
summary: 该项目是一个高性能代码智能MCP服务器，能将代码库索引为持久化知识图谱，支持158种语言、毫秒级查询且减少99%的令牌消耗。值得关注的是它作为单一静态二进制文件零依赖运行，为代码理解和分析提供了极致的效率与轻量化方案。

name: hermes-agent
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        NousResearch /

      hermes-agent  

    
      The agent that grows with you
summary: Hermes-Agent 是一个基于 Python 的、能随用户需求成长的自适应智能代理项目，因其灵活扩展性和持续进化能力而值得关注。

name: palmier-pro
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        palmier-io /

      palmier-pro  

    
      macOS video editor built for AI
summary: Palmier Pro 是一款专为 macOS 打造的 AI 视频编辑器，值得关注因为它将 AI 能力深度集成到视频编辑流程中，有望提升创作效率。

name: harness
description:
Star


  

  
    
    


      
        revfactory /

      harness  

    
      A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.
summary: Harness 是一个元技能框架，能够自动设计领域专属的智能体团队、定义专业化智能体并生成它们所需的技能，值得关注因为它将智能体编排从手动配置升级为自动化生成，极大提升了复杂任务中多智能体协作的灵活性与效率。
